questions.text: Differentiate between the three concepts Layers, Protocols and Interfaces in network architecture. Draw a diagram showing the relationship between the three.
How many bits can fit on a link with a 4 ms delay, if the bandwidth of the link is a. I Mbps? b. l0 Mbps? c. 100 Mbps?

The following character encoding is used in a data link protocol: A:0l000lll; B: lll000ll; FLAG:0llllll0; ESC: 11100000 Show the bit sequence transmitted (in binary) for the four-character frame: A B ESC FLAG when Flag bytes with byte stuffing is used.
Explain the working of Go-back-N protocol.
